prompt:
Generate a full-body, front-view portrait of character protagonist based on the following description, with a pure white background. The character should be centered in the image, occupying most of the frame. Gazing straight ahead. Standing with arms relaxed at sides. Natural expression.
Features: full-body shot, a beautiful young woman with extremely high intelligence, physical fitness, and charm, standing centered on a pure white background, anime style, Japanese animation style, vibrant colors, dark and oppressive tone. The character is Zurich Su, a female with silver-white long hair, deep purple eyes, pale skin, and a melancholic, weary, and cold expression. Her facial features are delicate and exquisite, with a slender figure. She wears a long black trench coat. Visible on her wrist is a scar. Her overall demeanor reflects the twisted fairy-tale ruin of the "Sunshine Rainbow Pony" world, hinting at inner torment and the "Empathy Curse" ability that forces her to feel the pain and despair of others., full body, standing pose, arms relaxed at sides, pure white background, character centered, no text, no symbols, no garbled characters, no words
Style: anime
No text, no symbols, no watermark, no garbled characters, no words.
